dialogue_text: for you must sleep, and eat and drink. However, you have brains, and it is worth a lot of bother to be able to think properly.
source_excerpt: "It must be inconvenient to be made of flesh," said the Scarecrow thoughtfully, "for you must sleep, and eat and drink. However, you have brains, and it is worth a lot of bother to be able to think properly."
